name: docs-drift-workspace
description: Catch documentation drift between Markdown docs and code-defined sources of truth.

scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run pack:cli && npm run pack:core
scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.tsbuildinfo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force"
